## Page 584


Error messages
Each error message is identified by a 5-character string that includes a unique number and specifies the part of the
program that generated the error and the severity of the error.
Syntax
programnnnseverity_level error_message_text
program
The first character indicates the part of the program that generated the error.
• J - Java components
• N - Mobius Administrator
• P - Policies
• S - Messages shared with Mobius z/OS
• W - Windows or Linux server messages
nnn
The identification number of the error message.
severity_level
The last character indicates the message severity.
• I - Informational
• W - Warning
• X - Exception
• E - Error
• D - Disaster
Mobius Java components (J*) messages
Review the following error messages related to Java components in Mobius.
J000E- User "XXX" is not a valid user.
Re-enter a valid user ID.
J001E- User "XXX" does not have sufficient permissions to access this feature.
Enter a user ID with the needed permissions.
J003E- Could not read value for profile string XXX.
Check that the specified database DSN (data source name) was configured correctly with the connection information.
J005E- Exception attempting to locate DsnCredentials implementation. Exception message: XXX
Check that the credentials for the specified database DSN (data source name) is configured.
J007E- Log file error: XXX
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 584


## Page 585


Check that the log file path is correct.
J008E- Command line format error: XXX
Fix the formatting error in the command line. Then resubmit.
J009E- Command line input validation error XXX YYY
Fix the input value in the command line. Then resubmit.
J010E- Document server not configured properly for full text indexing: XXX
Check that the document server is configured for full text indexing. Then resubmit.
J011E- Document server not found: XXX
The document server name is incorrect. Check the document server name. Then resubmit.
J012E- Indexing is disabled for document server: XXX
Enable indexing for the specified document server. Then resubmit.
J994E- Could not submit job because criteria were invalid: XXX
Correct the criteria. Then resubmit.
J995E- Could not get document information because criteria were invalid: XXX
Correct the criteria. Then resubmit.
J996W- Some matching jobs not cancelled: XXX
The specified jobs were not canceled. No action is required.
J998E- Job XXX not found during operation YYY
Verify the job ID that was specified.
J999E- Could not XXX job
The requested action could not be taken because the specified job could not be found.
Related information
Error messages
Mobius Administrator (N*) messages
Review the following error messages related to Mobius Administrator.
N001W- Installation log xxx could not be created
• There is not enough free disk space. Free up disk space.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 585


## Page 586


• You do not have permission to create the file. Reset permissions to allow file creation.
• You already have opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that
resource limits are adequate for the current system usage.
N002E- Could not create directory xxx
• The path name is invalid. Select another path name.
• There is not enough free disk space. Free up disk space.
• You do not have the right to set file permissions. Reset permissions to allow directory creation.
• You already have opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that
resource limits are adequate for the current system usage.
N003E- Unable to specify ODBC datasource of xxx for ODBC driver yyy.
The ODBC data source name was not specified. Run database setup.
N004E- Database Engine File xxx not found
The source directory for the database engine does not actually contain the engine, so it cannot be copied. Reinstall
the software.
N005E- Error in writing to installation log.
• There is not enough free disk space. Free up disk space.
• You do not have permission to create the file. Reset permissions to allow file creation.
• You already have opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that
resource limits are adequate for the current system usage.
N006E- File xxx could not be found - Database cannot be initialized.
The specified SQL file is not in the installation directory. Reinstall Mobius.
N007E- Error in writing to destination file xxx
• There is not enough free disk space. Free up disk space.
• You do not have permission to create the file. Reset permissions to allow file creation.
• You already have opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that
resource limits are adequate for the current system usage.
N008E- Unknown command line parameter of xxx
The parameter is not valid for this command. Enter a valid parameter, and resubmit.
N009E- The internal structure of Distribution Database Replication file xxx is invalid.
Verify that the file is a Distribution Database Replication file. Retrieve the file again.
N010E- Distribution Database Replication file xxx not found.
An incorrect path and file name was selected, or the file was deleted. Select a valid path and file name.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 586


## Page 587


N012E- The mobius.reg file does not contain a valid ODBC_DataSource entry. Run the Database Setup
program to begin setup.
Initialization did not complete successfully. Rerun database setup.
N013E- Unable to delete reportID=xxx reportVersion=yyy due to topic Items being present for that
combination.
Select the configuration option to delete associated topic indexes, or do not delete this report ID and report version
combination.
N014W- Number of retrieved rows will be limited to xxx
You selected too many rows to retrieve. Select fewer rows.
N015E- Unable to delete report "xxx" version "yyy" file "zzz"
• Mobius Administrator cannot delete the specified file. Check that the file exists. Check that the file is not read-
only or hidden. Check that you have file system rights to delete the file. Check that you have network rights to
delete the file.
• You already have opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that
resource limits are adequate for the current system usage.
N016E- A Recipient ID is required.
Enter a recipient ID. Then resubmit.
N017E- An incorrect password or recipient ID was entered.
Enter the correct password or recipient ID. Then resubmit.
N018W- Blank or invalid line on line xxx of list file.
While parsing a list file, the archiving process encountered a carriage return or line-feed before any text on a line. Edit
the list file, and use the proper format.
N019W- First field on line xxx of list file is not valid.
The field is blank, contains too many characters, or contains invalid characters. Edit the list file, and use a valid field
name.
N020W- Unable to extract data from first field on line xxx of list file.
No value was found for the REPORT_ID, FILE, or MEMBER field. Edit the list file, and specify fieldname=value pairs.
N021W- Field on line xxx of list file is not valid.
A fieldname=value pair is missing an equal sign. Edit the list file, and specify an equal sign.
N022E- FieldType on line xxx in list file does not match expected field type.
A field name from a fieldname=value pair is not one of the following: REPORT_ID, FILE, MEMBER, TOPIC, TYPE,
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 587


## Page 588


SECTION, DDNAME, ITEM, or VERSION. Edit the list file, and enter the correct fieldname=value pair.
N023E- Unable to extract data from field on line xxx of list file. No value entered for keyword.
Edit the list file to include the missing data. Then archive the list file.
N024E- Unable to extract xxx data on line yyy of list file.
The required data for the specified line is missing. For example, for a FILE line type, the TYPE or SECTION
fieldname=value pair is missing. Edit the list file, and specify the correct fieldname=value pairs.
N025E- Report type is unidentified - cannot create archive
The archiving process cannot determine the data type of the report that you are using. This situation occurs when
there is invalid data as input for a report record, and the data type was not manually updated. Update the properties
of the report. Then try to create the archive again.
N026W- Premature end of file reached - file will be truncated
The wrong file was selected, or the file is damaged. For IBM EBCDIC reports, this message might indicate that the
wrong file type is used or the record size is incorrect. The file was truncated at the last valid line, and the archive was
created. No action is required.
N027I- Report input file xxx has been moved to yyy.
No action is required.
N028E- Failed to move report input file xxx to yyy.
Archive creation is configured to move the specified report input file after the archive is successfully created, but the
file was not moved. First, check the server's message log. The message might have TechInfo that gives the precise
reason that the move failed. Use a file management program such as Windows Explorer to move the file. If you still
cannot move the file, the file management program might specify the reason.
• The file is read-only. Reset the file permissions, and retry.
• The file is open in another application. Close the other application, and retry.
• A file with the same name already exists in the specified destination. Rename the file, and retry.
• You have reached the resource limits configured for your operating system. Verify that resource limits are
adequate for the current system usage.
N029W- Page size limit has been reached - page break inserted.
The limit on the number of lines that can fit in a buffer was reached. Instead of using section code location
processing, create a policy.
N030E- You must specify a directory.
Specify a directory.
N031W- Version is not found in the report. Input file time stamp is used.
The policy is set up to extract a version from the report, but the version cannot be located.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 588


## Page 589


• The policy that you selected is not defined correctly for this report input file.
• The format of the input file changed after the policy was created.
Verify that the format of the report input file corresponds to the policy. Correct or replace the policy or input file as
necessary.
N033W- Index xxx is not found in the report.
The policy indicates that the specified index must occur in every report, but the index cannot be located because the
policy you selected is not defined correctly for this report input file or the format of the input file changed after the
policy was created.
Verify that the format of the report input file corresponds to the policy. Correct or replace the policy or input file as
necessary.
N034W- Index xxx is not found in the section yyy.
The policy indicates that the specified index must occur in every section, but the index cannot be located because the
policy you selected is not defined correctly for this report input file or after the policy was created, the format of the
input file changed.
Verify that the format of the report input file corresponds to the policy. Correct or replace the policy or input file as
necessary.
N035W- Index xxx is not found for the pages yyy of the section zzz.
The policy indicates that the specified index must occur on every page, but the index cannot be located because the
policy you selected is not defined correctly for this report input file or after the policy was created, the format of the
input file changed.
Verify that the format of the report input file corresponds to the policy. Correct or replace the policy or input file as
required.
N036W- Unable to resolve Report ID, ambiguous policies.
More than one applicable policy was found. Specify fewer policies, so that there is only one match.
N037W- Unable to determine the correct policy.
Ambiguous policies were detected during archive creation. Or you tried to open an archive that requires a redaction
policy, but the specified policy can’t be found or is an archiving policy rather than a redaction policy.
• Select an applicable candidate policy for the report.
• Create a valid policy. Then create the archive.
• Select the correct report file, and continue processing.
N038E- Path for report input file could not be determined.
Verify and then enter the path for the report input file.
N040E- Cannot open archive file.
• You are not authorized to open the requested file. Ask the Mobius Administrator to grant you access to the file.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 589


## Page 590


• The file does not exist. Create the document archive file.
• The file exists, but the path is incorrect. Enter the correct path.
• You already opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that resource
limits are adequate for the current system usage.
N041E- Unable to process command. Report ID xxx does not exist.
• You entered the report ID incorrectly. Resubmit the command with the correct report ID.
• You entered a report ID that has not yet been defined. To define the report ID, add a record to the report table.
Then resubmit the command.
N042E- Cannot create archive. None of the pages of the report input file match any of the candida
te policies.
• No pages of the report input file match any candidate policy. To create an archive, at least one page must
match a candidate policy. Verify that the correct candidate policies were selected. If the candidate policy list is
correct, compare the report pages to the policies. Edit one or more policies as necessary and resubmit.
• There is a mismatch between the report ID or the archive model file name. Ensure that the report ID and
archive model file name are correct.
• Mobius cannot locate the report definition. Create the report definition.
N043E- xxx already exists for single wildcard character.
Use a different symbol for the multiple wildcard character than is used for the single wildcard character.
N044W- Unable to determine the correct policy for nnn pages of report input file xxx. These pages
are stored in file yyy.
• The archiving process can't match a candidate policy to any page of the report input file.
• The archiving process found more than one candidate policy that matches a page of the report input file.
• The archiving process is storing these pages in the exception file specified by yyy.
Review the exception file to see which pages were not matched to a policy. Then identify a policy to use to archive the
page.
N045E- Cannot create archive. The section size exceeds the xxx page limit.
Verify that you associated the correct policy with this document. If so, increase the page limit by setting the
SectionSizeLimit key in the [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Mobius\INI\RDSWIN.INI\Policy] section of the
mobius.reg file.
N049E- Processing stopped due to incompatible options: xxx is not permitted with yyy.
• Correct the command line. Then resubmit.
• There are conflicting server settings. Edit the server settings as necessary. Then resubmit.
N051E- You do not have permission to access non-redacted information.
Ask your Mobius Administrator for permission to view non-redacted reports.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 590


## Page 591


N052E- Invalid redaction type specified for the report.
Mobius attempted to redact a report whose redaction type is not supported. Server-side redaction allows you to
redact text reports. Client-side redaction allows you to redact AFP, PCL, PDF/PS, and Xerox reports. Modify the
redaction type, and resubmit.
N053E- Redaction is disabled for the report "xxx".
A request was made to return a redacted page, but the report definition does not allow redaction. Correct, and
resubmit.
N055E- xxx value is not specified on line yyy of list file.
The archiving process cannot continue to process the list file because the required keyword value was not specified.
Remove the keyword, or specify the keyword value in the list file. Then resubmit.
N056E- Processing stopped due to incompatible options: xxx is not permitted unless yyy is specifi
ed.
One or more required parameters were not specified. Correct the command line. Then resubmit.
N057E- A parsing error caused archive creation to stop. Check the log file.
Archive creation encountered a parsing error and can't continue processing. Check the archive creation processing
log to see what caused this error. Correct and resubmit.
N058W- Policy xxx exists. Do you wish to replace it?
If you want to replace the existing policy, click Yes.
N059W- Archive Creation is in progress. Do you want to continue processing?
• (Recommended) To continue processing, click Yes. This choice ensures that the archiving process closes the
session.
• To exit the archiving process, click No. If the archiving process does not successfully remove itself from
memory on closing, press Ctrl+Alt+Delete, select the archiving process, and then click End Task.
N071E- xxx value on line yyy of list file is not supported.
The archiving process cannot continue to process the list file because the value is incorrect or not supported. Edit the
value as necessary in the list file. Then resubmit.
N076I- Archive creation started
No action is required.
N077I- Mode of operation: unattended
No action is required.
N078I- Mode of operation: interactive
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 591


## Page 592


No action is required.
N079I- Reading report input file: xxx Size: nnn Bytes
This message is written to the message log once for each report input file that is processed. No action is required.
N081D- Archive creation terminated unexpectedly. Check message log for details.
An error occurred while trying to create an archive. The archive creation message log might have enough information
to help you determine the cause of the error. If not, contact Rocket Technical Support.
N085I- Parsing method: policy based
No action is required.
N086I- Parsing method: section code location based
No action is required.
N087I- Parsing method: list file based
No action is required.
N098I- Archive creation canceled by user
No action is required.
N099E- Error in Topic file xxx. Topic file will be skipped.
This message indicates that the topic file is damaged. The JCL used to unload the topic file might contain an error. Or
the topic file was not downloaded correctly. The file must be downloaded as a binary file transfer. The file cannot
include character translation, such as EBCDIC to ASCII, and it cannot include carriage return, line feed (CRLF)
translation. Correct the file. Then resubmit.
N101I- Due to policy mismatch, report input file xxx was not deleted
Because not every page was matched to a policy, some information was not archived. To ensure that the information
was not lost, the report input file was not deleted.
Create a policy or modify an existing policy to ensure that every page of the report input file can be matched to a
policy. Retry archive creation.
N102I- Report input file xxx has been deleted.
No action is required.
N103E- Failed to delete report input file ‘xxx’
• The file is read-only. In Windows Explorer, open the Properties for the file and clear the read-only attribute.
• Another application has the file open. Close the file.
N104E- Duplicate Report ID
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 592


## Page 593


The selected report ID is already mapped to a SAP document. Select an unused report ID.
N108W- Login failed. Invalid Recipient ID or password.
Enter the correct ID or password. Then resubmit.
N109W- Login failed. Server unavailable.
Mobius cannot connect to the network server that was selected for login authentication. Verify the selected
authentication method and network server. For authentication against a Windows server, verify that the Mobius
Authentication Service is installed on the selected server.
N113I- Using forced Report ID of xxx
No action is required.
N114E- Invalid filename.
The file name contains one or more characters that are not allowed. Ensure that all characters in the file name are
allowed. The following characters are not allowed: , / > < ; + = * | ] [ “ ?
N115E- Cannot archive PCL or PostScript reports using section code location processing
The report being archived is defined in the report table with a data type of PCL or PostScript. You must archive this
report with a policy; you cannot use section code location processing. Change the report definition, or change the
type of processing.
N116E- Unable to open packet separator template xxx
Mobius did not find the separator page template file.
• The template file is not located in the expected directory. Mobius looks for separator page template files in the
directory specified by the TextTemplateLocation keyword in the [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Mobius\
INI\RDSWIN.INI\Document Distribution] section of the mobius.reg. If the templates are not in this
directory, move the templates to this directory, or change the directory specified in the mobius.reg file. For
example, "TextTemplateLocation"="c:\\Mobius\\templates\\pkt\\txt".
• The template file is missing, or the file name is misspelled. Make sure the file exists and the file name is
entered correctly in the Separator page file name field of the Print Distribution Group table.
N117E- Duplicate archive ID.
You entered an archive ID that already exists. Enter a unique archive ID.
N118E- Duplicate archive ID and document class.
You entered an archive ID and document class combination that already exists. Correct the entry. Then resubmit.
N119W- Your input xxx was changed to yyy to conform to database length restrictions. Do you wish
to use this new value?
The value that you entered uses DBCS characters. Mobius truncated the value to ensure that the maximum field
length is not exceeded when translation occurs. Click Yes to accept the truncated value. Click No to return to the field
and enter a different value.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 593


## Page 594


N120W- Mobius service install failure.
Check the message log and the Windows log to identify the service that failed.
N121W- Mobius service failed to start.
Server Controller reported that a Mobius service failed to start. Check the message log and the Windows log for more
information.
N122W- Mobius service failed to stop.
Server Controller reported that a Mobius service failed to stop. Check the message log and the Windows log for more
information.
N123W- Document Server xxx does not exist.
Specify the correct document server name.
N124W- Document Server xxx is disabled.
An OpenSession request was received for a document server that is disabled. Enable the document server, or try
connecting to a document server that is not disabled.
N125E- Duplicate document type.
You attempted to define a document type that already exists. Correct and resubmit.
N130W- Unable to delete incomplete archive xxx.
The archiving process opened a document archive file, but because of a processing error, did not finish creating the
file and could not delete it. Use Windows Explorer or a command to delete the incomplete archive.
N131E- Unable to extract data from field on line xxx of list file. The field data is too long.
The report ID and topic ID values cannot exceed 10 characters; the section ID and topic item values cannot exceed 30
characters. Change the value on the specified line. Then archive the list file.
N134E- Recipient xxx does not have permission to update the database.
Specify a recipient ID that has the required permission.
N135W- Topic items for report xxx, version yyy were not added to the database.
The archiving process could not add topic items for the specified report version because one or more database
records were locked. Close the application that is locking the record. Then resubmit.
N136E- Archive creation failed during phase xxx.
If archive creation fails, this is one of the messages that are written to the archive creation message log.
• For interactive mode, another error message is displayed on the screen. This message indicates the cause of
the error and the action needed to correct it. After you determine the cause of the error, correct the problem.
Then resubmit.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 594


## Page 595


• For unattended mode processing, review the processing phase and additional messages in the archive creation
message log to determine the cause of the error. If you cannot determine the cause, run archive creation in
interactive mode so that a specific error message is displayed on the screen. After you determine the cause of
the error, correct the problem. Then resubmit.
N138W- Due to error in image-based or section code processing, report input file xxx was not dele
ted.
Because an archive was not successfully created, the report input file was not deleted. Use the processing log to
determine the cause of the processing error. Because the report input file was not deleted, you can correct the
problem and archive the file again.
N139W- Section ID is not Offset metadata field.
The section ID is not in the format that is required by SAP ArchiveLink. Check the configuration with your Mobius SAP
administrator.
N140E- You do not have permission to create, modify, or delete policies.
Your recipient ID is not authorized to create, edit, or delete policies. Ask your Mobius Administrator to give you
permission to define policies.
N141E- You do not have permission to create archives.
Your recipient ID is not authorized to create archives. Ask your Mobius Administrator give you permission to create
archives.
N142E- You do not have permission to delete reports.
Your recipient ID is not authorized to delete reports. Ask your Mobius Administrator to give you permission to delete
archives.
N144E- You do not have permission to run Importer.
Your recipient ID is not authorized to run the database import utility. Ask your Mobius Administrator to give you
permission to define reports.
N146E- You do not have permission to run Archive Creator.
Your recipient ID is not authorized to create archives. Ask your Mobius Administrator to give you permission to create
archives.
N148E- You do not have permission to view or change annotations.
Your recipient ID is not authorized to view or change annotations. Ask your Mobius Administrator to give you at least
one of the following permissions: View Annotations, Create or Modify Annotations, or Delete Annotations.
N149E- Job “uuu”: User “vvv” on “www” using “xxx” failed with document “yyy” because of error “zz
z”
While attempting to archive a job, the spool archive server encountered an error. Refer to the error code for the
reason and actions.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 595


## Page 596


N150I- Job “uuu”: User “vvv” on “www” using “xxx” started spooling document “yyy”
The spool archive server started a processing job. No action is required.
N151I- Job “uuu”: User “vvv” on “www” using “xxx” completed spooling document “yyy”
The spool archive server successfully retrieved a job from the spooling system. No action is required.
N152I- Job “uuu”: User “vvv” on “www” using “xxx” completed archiving document “yyy”
The spool archive server completed archiving a job. No action is required.
N153I- Job “uuu”: User “vvv” on “www” using “xxx” deleted document “yyy”
The spool archive server deleted a job after processing successfully completed. No action is required.
N154E- An error with Spool Archive Server occurred.
The spool archive server could not communicate with the archiving process. Stop the spool archive server. Restart
the archiving process. Then retry.
N155E- You must specify a report input file.
Add the –F parameter and the file name to the acreate command. Then resubmit the command.
N160E- Unable to process command. The XML data contains the following type of error: xxx.
Fix the error in the XML file. Then resubmit the command.
N161E- Unable to process command. The XML data has an error in line xxx, column yyy, description:
zzz.
Fix the error in the XML file. Then resubmit the command.
N167I- Report xxx: version yyy has distribution pending. The report version was not deleted
Mobius found a report version with pending distributions and did not delete it because you did not add the –y
parameter to the command. No action is required.
N168E- Unable to process adelete. You did not specify the xxx.
The adelete command is missing a required parameter. Add the parameter. Then resubmit the command.
N170E- Unable to generate filename. The filename is based on previously created names, and the ar
chiving process cannot locate the xxx file.
The file name template contains the %unique% variable. The archiving process generates a new file name based on a
file name that was previously generated with the %unique% variable. The specified document archive file is missing,
so the archiving process cannot generate the new file name.
• If the file was deleted accidentally, restore the missing file from a backup.
• If you want to delete the file, use the adelete command with the –L option to delete the report version record.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 596


## Page 597


N173E- The xxx parameter requires a value.
A required value is missing. Enter the value. Then resubmit the command.
N174E- The value xxx is not valid for parameter yyy.
The selected value is not valid with other parameters. Edit one or more parameters as necessary. Then resubmit the
command.
N176E- Unable to perform the xxx action on element yyy with key(s) zzz.
The XML input file contains a request that is not valid. Edit the request. Then resubmit the command.
N177W- Report input file xxx is empty. Archive creation is skipping this file.
Your command includes the -i parameter that causes the archiving process to ignore errors and continue
processing. Because the specified file is empty, the archiving process ignored it and continued processing the
remaining files. If you did not anticipate an empty report input file, check your report generation process. Otherwise,
no action is required.
N178E- Cannot create topic item xxx for topic yyy. The topic record specifies a numeric data type
that does not match the policy.
Edit the topic record or the policy so that both have the same data type.
N179W- Created topic item xxx for topic yyy as character data. The policy specifies this is numer
ic data.
The topic is set up to store character topic items, but the policy is set up to extract numeric topic items. Change the
policy to extract character data, or use Mobius Administrator to change the topic to store numeric topic items.
N180W- Directory xxx does not exist.
Select another directory, or create the specified directory. Then resubmit.
N181W- Crypto API Error: xxx.
The function used to encrypt a URL returned an error. Review the error message that was returned.
N182E- Login failed. Invalid access information provided.
Correct the access information. Then resubmit.
N183E- ArchiveLink Setup error: xxx.
Correct the setup.
N184E- There is not enough free disk space on xxx.
Free up space, or point to a directory that has enough available space. Then resubmit.
N185E- The list file contains a line termination character that is not valid for this operating s
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 597


## Page 598


ystem.
Review the server message log for specific information about the problem. Revise the list file as necessary.
N187W- The archive may not render correctly. One of the required resources could not be archived.
Name “xxx”, type “yyy”
The report input file requires a resource that cannot be archived. If the resource is unavailable to Mobius View,
ensure that the resource path is correct. If the path is correct, check the RDSWIN.MSG file for additional information.
N188E- Cannot create archive because the filename template is blank. Modify the properties for th
e report you are archiving and add the filename template.
The archiving process generates a file name from the template specified in the report definition or content class
definition. Because the Template field is blank, the archive cannot be created.
Update the file name template for the content class of the report that you were archiving, and add a valid template
on the Filename tab.
N189E- Not able to create an archive with the path and filename specified: xxx.
• There is not enough free disk space to create the archive. Free up disk space.
• The file name already exists. Change the file name template to ensure that a unique file name is generated.
• You already have opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that
resource limits are adequate for the current system usage.
N190E- There are no policy selection rules that match these archiving conditions. To create the a
rchive, change the archiving conditions or change a policy selection rule.
To create the archive, you must specify a candidate policy in a policy selection rule.
• Change the archiving conditions to match the conditions in an existing policy selection rule.
• Change a policy selection rule, or create a new policy selection rule to match the current archiving conditions.
• If you are using the acreate command, use the –c parameter to specify a candidate policy.
N191E- An Archive Error occurred, Centera native message is: xxx.
EMC Centera encountered a problem and displayed one of the following messages:
• An error code or text message. Consult your EMC Centera documentation, or contact EMC Support.
• It was not possible to establish a connection with a cluster. No IP address or port number is
specified for connecting to the EMC Centera storage manager, or the IP address or port number specified is
not valid. In Mobius Administrator, configure the IP address and port number to connect to the EMC Centera
storage manager.
• The use of this operation is restricted. You attempted to delete an archive before the specified EMC
Centera retention period passed. Wait until the retention period passes, then try to delete the archive.
N192E- Topic item xxx cannot be converted to the numeric format defined for topic xxx.
You used a numeric topic item that the archiving process cannot format as numeric data. Redefine the topic ID in the
correct format. Then create the archive.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 598


## Page 599


N193E- Syntax Error- Duplicate parameter: “xxx”
The parameter was specified more than once on the command line. Enter the command with only one instance of
the parameter.
N194E- Unable to archive any of the files specified in the list file.
• The list file was empty. Verify that the list file contains at least one file for archiving.
• The list file contains parsing errors. Correct the errors listed in the processing log.
N195E- Report input file too large: XXX.
The report input file is too large. Divide the input file into smaller reports. The file size limit for an input report is 4 GB
or the limit imposed by the operating system, whichever is less.
• For Windows systems with drives formatted as FAT or FAT 32, the limit is 2 GB.
• For Windows systems with drives formatted as NTFS, the limit is 4 GB.
• For Linux systems and drives mounted without the LARGE_FILES option, the limit is 2 GB.
• For Linux systems and drives mounted with the LARGE_FILES option, the limit is 4 GB.
N197E- Archiving stopped because the location indexing topics do not contain the same number of e
ntries.
The list file contains the LOCATION-TOPIC-IDS keyword, which configures location indexing. For location indexing, you
must enter the same set of topic indexes for each entity that you are indexing. Correct the list file. Then retry.
N198E- VDRLink document error: xxx.
Refer to the VDRLink error message for an explanation and recommended actions.
N199E- SAP Barcode document error: xxx.
Refer to the VDRLink error message for an explanation and recommended actions.
N200E- Archive creation error: document archive file has incorrect size.
The number of blocks written to the document archive file doesn’t match the size of the file that was reported after
archive creation. This situation indicates that the storage system failed to write one or more blocks, but didn’t return
an error to the Mobius server.
Retry archive creation, or open a ticket with Rocket Technical Support and with the manufacturer of the storage
system.
N201E- Recipient xxx does not have permission to run XML Importer.
To use the vdrdbxml command, your recipient ID must have at least one of the following permissions: Define
recipients, Define reports, Define policies, or Allow distribution migration. Ask your Mobius Administrator give
you the required permission.
N202E- To perform this operation, you must be configured with the Define Recipients permission.
Your recipient ID is not authorized to define recipients. Ask your Mobius Administrator to give you the required
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 599


## Page 600


permission.
N203E- To perform this operation, you must be configured with the Define Reports permission.
Your recipient ID is not authorized to define reports. Ask your Mobius Administrator to give you the required
permission.
N204E- To perform this operation, you must be configured with the Define Policies permission.
Your recipient ID is not authorized to define policies. Ask your Mobius Administrator to give you the required
permission.
N205E- To perform this operation, you must be configured with the Distribution Access permission.
Your recipient ID is not authorized to configure distributions. Ask your Mobius Administrator to give you the required
permission.
N206W- The name already exists. Do you want to modify this instance anyway?
The name that you entered for this Mobius instance is not unique. To replace the existing instance, click Yes.
Otherwise, click No.
N207E- Error while generating archive index values.
An error occurred while index values were being generated. If you are using the archiving process, click Technical
info. If you are using another archiving method, review the Mobius server message log. Correct the problem. Then
resubmit.
N208E- Authorization error: xxx.
Review the details of the error. Correct the error. Then resubmit.
N209E- Duplicate authorization instance.
You attempted to create a duplicate authorization instance. Provide a unique instance name.
N210E- Report ID xxx is not found in the database. Use Mobius Administrator to define it.
The list file that you selected to archive contains an unrecognized content class. Use Mobius Administrator to define
the content class; edit the list file to use a content class that is already defined; or select a valid list file to archive.
N215E- Report ID is undefined on line xxx of list file.
Edit the list file to use a content class that is defined, or select a valid list file to archive.
N217W- Items of numeric topic xxx were ignored in search.
A search request specified a "like" operator, but numeric topics can’t be matched with "like." No action is necessary.
N218E- Pageset defining topic “xxx” has more than one value on a page. Please use Mobius Administ
rator to select another pageset defining topic
You specified a topic ID to define a page set. The archiving process found two different topic item values on the same
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 600


## Page 601


page for this topic ID. A page set can have only one topic item value per page.
In Mobius Administrator, define a page set and specify a topic ID that contains only one topic item value per page. If
you do not want to define a page set, remove the entry from the Topic ID field.
N219E- Unable to remove last Report Version Instance.
You tried to use the amigrate or lcupdate command to remove the last report version instance.
To delete the last instance, use the d (delete) action rather than the r (remove) action. If you are using the lcupdate
command, pass the action in the –M parameter. If you are using the amigrate command, correct the migration rule.
N220E- New Current Instance must not be removed.
You tried to use the amigrate or lcupdate command to remove the report version instance that is being created.
Correct the command. Then resubmit.
N221W- Report Version is on hold.
You attempted to delete a report version that is on hold. Use the amigrate or lcupdate command to remove the
hold. Then resubmit.
N222E- The Report ID xxx specified in the list file does not exist.
You attempted to use a list file to create an archive, but the report ID specified in the list file does not exist. Correct
the command. Then resubmit.
N227E- One or more errors were found in the list file(s). Please see the archive creation log fil
e for details.
Review the archive log file. Correct the problem. Then resubmit.
N228I- Processing report version xxx for report yyy.
The replarch command is replicating the specified report version and report ID. No action is required.
N229I- Successfully replicated report version xxx for report yyy.
The replarch command successfully replicated the specified report version. No action is required.
N231E- Failed to replicate report version xxx for report yyy.
The replarch command did not replicate the specified report version. Verify that you used the correct report version
parameters and options in the command. Edit one or more parameters as necessary. Then resubmit.
N233E- The archive document ID, xxx, exceeds the limit of 40 characters.
You attempted to define a SAP archive document ID that is too long. Define a shorter document ID. Then resubmit.
N234E- Unable to locate report xxx created on yyy.
The replarch command did not locate the report version that has the archive creation date specified in the –RV
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 601


## Page 602


parameter. Modify the –RV parameter in the command. Then resubmit.
N236E- Unable to locate a report version for report xxx that was created after yyy.
The replarch command did not locate a report version that has an archive creation date later than the start date
specified in the –FD parameter, or the command did not locate a report version that has an archive creation date
within the number of days specified in the –PD parameter. The first date of the specified date range is the date
equivalent to the number of days prior to the current date specified in the –PD value.
Edit the -FD or -PD parameter. Then resubmit.
N237I- Total of xxx report versions replicated with yyy topic items.
The replarch command successfully replicated the specified number of report versions and topic IDs. No action is
required.
N245E- Java layer error: "xxx"
The error provides details. Correct and resubmit.
N247E- You must include the processing option that deletes document archive files.
The adelete command that you submitted contains the processing parameter-Y with the option to delete a report
version (-v), but does not include the option to delete document archive files associated with that report version (-f).
The command discovered that a document archive file associated with that report version still exists.
Delete the document archive files associated with the report version. Edit the adelete command, and include the
option to delete associated document archive files (-f) to the –Y processing parameter. Then resubmit the command.
N248E- Must delete both record and file for SnapLock and Centera archives. Report xxx, version yy
y, filename zzz.
You attempted to delete a report version that has its associated document archive file on a SnapLock-compliant or
Centera storage system. On these storage systems, you must delete the version record and its associated document
archive file at the same time. The delete request does not include the appropriate options to remove both the report
version and its associated archived file.
• If you used the adelete command, edit the command. Specify the processing options to delete the document
archive file and the report version – for example, –Y ALL or –Y vf.
• If you used Mobius Administrator to try to delete the report version, click Abort on the error message. On the
Processing tab of the Mobius Administrator Options dialog, select Delete Report Version Entry and Delete
Associated Archive File.
N249I- Total of xxx report versions processed with yyy topic items.
The replarch command successfully transferred control records for all of the report versions and topic IDs specified
for replication to Mobius z/OS. No action is required.
N253E- An FTP error occurred. For details, view the FTP error log, xxx.
Because of an error, the replarch command was not processed. To determine the cause of the error, look at the FTP
error log.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 602


## Page 603


N254E- Failed to process the archive replication request.
The replarch command was unable to complete. Verify that the command has the correct parameters and options.
Edit the command as necessary. Then resubmit.
N255I- Completed processing report version xxx for report yyy.
The replaudit command successfully completed the audit process for the specified report version and report ID. No
action is required.
N256I- File xxx could not be deleted because it is a read-only file.
The replaudit command can't delete read-only files.
N257I- Unable to delete file xxx because the file could not be located.
The replaudit command can't locate the file specified for deletion. No action is required.
N258I- File xxx was deleted.
The replaudit command deleted the specified file. No action is required.
N259E- Failed to process report version xxx for report yyy.
Check the preceding message in the log to find out why the report version did not process. Make the appropriate
changes. Then resubmit.
N261I- Total of xxx report versions processed successfully.
The replaudit command successfully audited the specified number of report versions. No action is required.
N262I- Unable to delete report xxx version yyy because an unexpired instance exists.
Mobius found an unexpired report instance and did not delete the report. No action is required.
N263E- Mail Parser error: xxx.
When the email parser attempted to extract information from email message (MSG) files, one of the following
problems occurred:
• Unable to extract attachments from the email message. Verify that the attachment exists.
• Unable to open the message file. Verify that the email message exists and that it is not damaged or locked by
another process. Review the system requirements. Confirm that you are using a supported version of
Microsoft Office. Supported versions include the Extended MAPI library, which is required to extract
information from email messages.
N264E- MAPI Wrapper error: xxx.
Where xxx is one of these error messages:
• Unable to determine path for Extended MAPI library.
• Unable to resolve function function code.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 603


## Page 604


• Attempt to access function function code when library not loaded.
The MAPI wrapper obtains functions from the Extended MAPI library. Confirm that you are using a supported version
of Microsoft Office.
N267E- You must specify new current instance ID. Number of versions successfully processed for Re
port xxx is 0.
When you use thelcupdate command to perform a move migration (-M m) on a current report version instance, you
must specify the remaining instance to be the new current report version instance.
Edit the lcupdate command. Add the -N parameter to specify a new current instance. To assign a specific instance as
the current instance, enter the integer value of that instance. To assign the next instance as the current instance,
enter the value n.
N319E- The following option is not valid with the -y parameter: xxx.
Specify a valid option for the adelete command. For information about valid options, see the documentation for the
command.
N385E- Unable to delete archive file for report xxx, version yyy; report version is preserved.
To delete a report version, you must also delete the archived file. In this case, you attempted to delete the archived
file, but it was not deleted for one of the following reasons:
• The file is read-only. Change the attribute or permission of the file so that it is no longer read-only.
• The file is archived to a compliant storage system but its retention period has not expired. Wait until the file
retention period expires. Then delete the file.
N386E- Topic granularity inconsistency. Topic xxx defined in the database with yyy, but has zzz i
n the current report.
Inconsistent topic granularity was encountered during archive creation. Correct and resubmit.
N387E- The "xxx" action on element "yyy" is not supported
You attempted to perform an action that is not supported. Correct the XML file. Then resubmit.
N388E- Multiple values (xxx) found on page yyy for attribute topic "zzz"; not supported.
Duplicate attribute topic values for the same content reference were encountered. Correct and resubmit.
N401E- Unable to add converted values with SQL Loader. Return code=xxx, control file=yyy.
The invocation of the Oracle SQL Loader returned an error. Look up the return code in the Oracle SQL Loader
documentation. Otherwise, save the control file and then contact Rocket Technical Support.
N493E- Failed to delete topic access right for Recipient xxx and Topic yyy because there are asso
ciated topic item access rights.
The dbimport command failed to delete the specified topic access right. Remove the associated topic item access
rights. Then resubmit.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 604


## Page 605


N494E- File too large; set ChunkingAction or increase MaxNonChunkedFileSize.
The file is too large to archive. Set ChunkingAction=Chunk in the mobius.reg file:
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Mobius\INI\rdswin.ini\MISC]
"ChunkingAction"="Chunk"
N507E- Conflicting granularity information for topic xxx on page yyy. Detected a mix of line leve
l and non line level topic items.
Inconsistent topic granularity was encountered during archive creation. Correct and resubmit.
N508E- Maximum number of opened database connections has been reached, Pool Name: xxx.
Where xxx is the process server name. The number of open database connections reached the configured limit.
Increase the limit, or close some connections.
N517E- Specified Table Name is not valid. It must start with an uppercase alphabetic character.
You entered an invalid topic table name. Correct the name. Then resubmit.
N518E- Specified Table Name is not valid. Only uppercase alphabetic, numeric and underscore chara
cters are allowed.
You entered an invalid topic table name. Correct the name. Then resubmit.
N519E- The field: xxx is missing from region: yyy on page: zzz.
A required field is missing from a region. Correct the policy. Then resubmit.
N526E- The retention expiration is outside the supported range.
The retention expiration date must be before January 18, 2038. Modify the migration rule that is associated with the
report ID, and specify a date that is before January 18, 2038.
N533E- Already processed Report Version "xxx" for Report "yyy"
The same report ID and version ID combination is listed more than once in the XML file. This duplication is not
allowed. Correct the XML file. Then resubmit.
N534E- Document entries already exist for Report Version "xxx" / Report "yyy"
Document table entries for the same report ID and version ID combination were generated more than once in the
XML file. This duplication is not allowed. Correct the XML file. Then resubmit.
N536W- Topic values indexing unexpired sections were not deleted.
Some topic values were not deleted because they index unexpired sections. No action is required.
N537W- Unexpired sections were not deleted.
Some sections were not deleted because they have not expired. No action is required.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 605


## Page 606


N538W- Report xxx, Version yyy was not deleted because it contains unexpired sections.
Topic items that are not on hold or that contained expired sections were deleted. To delete the remaining topic items
and sections, remove the hold; or wait until the topic items expire and then delete them.
N539E- Recipient xxx does not have permission to create, modify, or delete topic values that refe
rence held documents.
Your recipient ID does not have the MANIPULATE_TOPIC_ITEM_VALUES_FOR_HELD_DOCUMENTS permission. Ask
your Mobius Administrator to give you the required permission.
N540E- Recipient xxx does not have permission to create, modify, or delete retention topic value
s.
Your recipient ID does not have one or more of the following permissions: ADD_RETENTION_TOPIC_ITEM_VALUES,
MODIFY_RETENTION_TOPIC_ITEM_VALUES, and DELETE_RETENTION_TOPIC_ITEM_VALUES. Ask your Mobius
Administrator to give you the required permission.
N541E- Invalid call to Topic Item Update Enhanced - xxx.
The specified issue was encountered during Topic Item Update Enhanced processing. Correct and resubmit.
N542E- Invalid request when exporting retention information.
The XML file specified in the vdrdbxml command contains an action to skip exporting the retention information.
Remove the -SRI action from the XML file.
N543E- Failed to update instance for Report xxx, Version yyy, file zzz.
While attempting to update a migration instance, instances were found that are on hold or unexpired. Contact Rocket
Technical Support.
N544E- Auditing is required for this operation, a document server link must be supplied.
Mobius attempted to start a session that requires auditing, but the vdrdbxmlcommand did not specify a document
server link. Use the -DSL parameter to specify the document server link.
N545E- Auditing is not available and is required for document server: xxx. Contact your Mobius Ad
ministrator. Recipient: yyy.
The recipient enabled mandatory auditing, but the audit service assigned to the document server is not active. Start
the audit service assigned to the document server.
N548E- Print distribution to recipient ttt failed - report uuu, version vvv, section www, distrib
ution group xxx, print device ID yyy, print device name zzz.
While attempting to distribute the report to the printer, a failure occurred during end-report processing or end-
packet processing. To find out why the report was not distributed, check the preceding message in the log. Then
make the appropriate changes, and resubmit. Note that only the information that is in the last section of the report
or packet is available.
N549E- E-mail distribution to recipient uuu failed - report vvv, version www, section xxx, distri
bution group yyy, e-mail address zzz.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 606


## Page 607


While attempting to distribute the specified report by email, a failure occurred during end-report processing or end-
packet processing. to find out why the report was not distributed. Then make the appropriate changes, and resubmit.
Note that only the information that is in the last section of the report or packet is available.
N550E- Distribution failed for report xxx, version yyy.
to find out why the report was not distributed, check the preceding message in the log. Then make the appropriate
changes, and resubmit. To track every distribution failure, set DisregardErrorInPacketProcessing to FALSE in the
mobius.reg file:
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Mobius\INI\RDSWIN.INI\Document Distribution]
"DisregardErrorInPacketProcessing"="N"
Note that the first distribution failure to an output device causes distribution to stop for that device.
N551E- Could not connect to Audit Service on xxx using document server yyyyyy.
The process failed to connect to the audit service. Verify the audit service configuration, and confirm that the audit
service is running.
N552E- Document server xxx is already configured to perform automated records management with the
specified database. Only one document server can be designated to perform Records Manager operati
ons for a given database.
You attempted to assign a second document server to perform automatic records management. To assign a different
document server to automatically manage records management, you must first disable this option from the
document server listed in the message, and then reconfigure this document server.
N553E- The intermediate archive retention value xxx may not be lower than the minimum of yyy.
Set the intermediate archive retention value to 30 or higher.
N554E- The intermediate archive retention value xxx must be zero, unless the report is set to Eve
nt-based retention and the model filename points to compliant media.
Set the intermediate archive retention value to 0. If you are using a compliant storage system, set the retention to
event-based.
N555E- The next Records Manager processing time value xxx cannot be zero when the report is set t
o Event-based retention and the report version filename points to compliant media
Set the Records Manager processing time to a non-zero value.
N556E- The next Records Manager processing time value xxx must be zero, unless the report version
filename points to compliant media.
Set the processing time value to 0.
N557E- Mobius cannot migrate Report xxx Version yyy. Reason: zzz
Correct the problem described in the message text. Then retry migration.
N558E- Mobius cannot extend the retention for Report xxx Version yyy. Extending the retention per
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 607


## Page 608


iod for event based retention is not supported.
Mobius cannot extend the retention period. Contact Rocket Technical Support.
N559E- Mobius cannot lengthen the retention for Report xxx Version yyy. Lengthening the retention
period for event based retention is not supported.
Mobius cannot lengthen the retention period. Contact Rocket Technical Support.
N560E- Intermediate archive retention parameter (-J) is only valid when the retention parameter
(-C) is defined as EventBased.
You specified an invalid combination of options for the lcupdate command. Define the -C parameter as EVENTBASED.
Then retry migration.
N561W- Mobius did not delete the document server because Records Manager is ACTIVE. To delete thi
s document server, stop Records Manager and then repeat the deletion procedure.
You cannot delete document servers while Records Manager is active. To delete this document server, stop Records
Manager. Then repeat the deletion procedure.
N562E- Records Manager process experienced more than xxx unsuccessful operations.
Review the message log to see the errors that occurred. Correct the problem. Then restart the services.
N564E- The next action date is outside the supported range.
Modify the migration rule that is associated with the content class so that the WAIT_TIME and WAIT_UNITS, when
added to the current date, specify a date that is before January 18, 2038.
N565E- Error xxx reading document server authentication key from yyy.
Mobius failed to read the configured authentication key, and a dynamically generated authentication key was
created. Verify that the authentication key that the server points to is present. To avoid authentication errors that
result from a LAN malfunction, point the authentication key to a local file.
N566E- Error attempting xxx request to yyy occurred for zzz.
The operation that you requested – for example, delete, update, or submit – was not completed because Mobius
could not send the request to the indexing service. Report the problem to your Mobius Administrator.
N567E- End of year parameter (-X) is only valid when the retention parameter (-C) is defined as Y
earEnd.
Define the -C parameter as YearEnd. Then retry.
N568E- End of year parameter (-X) must be specified when the retention parameter (-C) is defined
as YearEnd.
Define the -X parameter to specify the year end. Then retry. Note that the -X value, which is greater than or equal to
0, causes report versions to be retained until the end of the calendar year in which the fixed retention period ends.
For example, if today's date is 6/1/2015 and you specify -C YearEnd and -X 1, the archive is retained until the end of
the current year (12/31/2015) plus one year (365 days), which is 12/31/2016.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 608


## Page 609


N573D- Data source name returned from the server was empty.
The request to retrieve the DSN credentials from the server returned an empty data source name. Ask your Mobius
Administrator to check the server’s data source configuration.
N576D- Could not load service client library (xxx). Error message: (yyy).
The specified library (.dll on Windows, .so on Linux) failed to load. The error message from the library loader
recommends the appropriate action to take.
N577D- Could not call service client library function (xxx).
The specified function is not exported from the library. Ask your Mobius Administrator to check the Mobius server
installation.
N581E- Incompatible parameters provided: cannot have both -s and -dsu.
You specified the -s parameter and the deprecated –dsu parameter. Correct and resubmit.
N595W- The report version range is not valid; the -K parameter is greater than the -T parameter.
Mobius did not find any report versions because the last report version defined for processing is newer than the first
report version. Edit one or more parameters as necessary. Then resubmit.
N596W- The Document Server xxx cannot be deleted at this time. The server is currently performing
Records Manager-related background processing. Please try again after a few minutes.
You tried to delete a document server while it was performing a background task. Wait a few minutes. Then retry.
N597E- The initial fixed retention value may not be set to a non-zero value unless the report is
set to Event-based retention. A value of xxx is not valid.
Change the initial fixed retention value to 0. Then retry.
N598E- The initial fixed retention value xxx may not be lower than the minimum of 30.
For event-based retention reports, the initial fixed retention value must be 30 or higher. Change the initial fixed
retention value. Then retry.
N599E- The report retention type cannot be changed from non-Event-based retention to Event-based
retention when the initial fixed retention period is not zero (0). Value xxx is not allowed.
Change the initial fixed retention value to 0. Then retry.
N600E- Invalid input xml file. See log for the detailed information
Check the RDSWIN.MSG file or the vdrws.log file for additional information. Correct the XML. Then run the
VdrDistClient command.
N601E- DistStartTime, DistEndTime attributes must be specified for deferred distributions
The DISTRIBUTION_INSTANCE is set to type=DEFERRED, but a time range for selecting distributions was not specified.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 609


## Page 610


Specify the DistStartTime and DistEndTime attributes in the DISTRIBUTION_INSTANCE element of the XML input file,
or change the DISTRIBUTION_INSTANCE to RERUN. Then resubmit.
N602E- Invalid distribution type: xxx.
In the XML input file, change the value of the DISTRIBUTION_INSTANCE type to DEFERRED or RERUN. Then resubmit.
N603E- Invalid value for the attribute Option of the xxx element: yyy.
Edit the element to use the correct option attribute. Then resubmit.
• For the DISTRIBUTION_GROUPS element, the option attribute must be ALL_GROUPS, ALL_EMAIL_GROUPS, or
ALL_PRINT_GROUPS.
• For the RECIPIENTS element, the option attribute must be ALL_RECIPIENTS.
• For the REPORTS element, the option attribute must be ALL_REPORTS.
• For the REPORT element, the option attribute must be ALL_REPORT_VERSIONS.
N604E- Invalid distribution group type: xxx.
In the XML input file, set the DISTRIBUTION_INSTANCE type to DEFERRED or RERUN. Then resubmit.
N605E- Invalid Report ID: xxx.
Enter the correct report ID, or delete report ID from the configuration file. Then resubmit.
N606E- Report ID must be specified for the element REPORT.
The required REPORT_ID attribute of the REPORT element is empty. Specify the REPORT_ID attribute. Then resubmit.
N607W- Report version xxx ignored due to incorrect value
Edit the report version value, or delete the report version from the configuration file. Then resubmit.
N608E- <RECIPIENTS> element should contain ALL_RECIPIENTS Option value or nested elements <RECIPI
ENT>
The required element RECIPIENTS is empty. Add the option type=ALL_RECIPIENTS, or nest RECIPIENTS elements in
the XML input file. Then resubmit
N609W- Distribution group xxx is overridden by yyy.
The nested DISTRIBUTION_GROUP element was ignored because in the DISTRIBUTION_GROUPS element, ALL_GROUPS,
ALL_PRINT_GROUPS, or ALL_EMAIL_GROUPS was specified. Change the combination of rules; delete the option
attribute; or delete the distribution group.
N610W- Report xxx is overridden by ALL_REPORTS.
The nested REPORT element was ignored because in the REPORTS element, ALL_REPORTS was specified as the option
attribute. Change the combination of rules; delete the option attribute; or delete the report.
N611W- Report version xxx is overridden by ALL_REPORT_VERSIONS.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 610


## Page 611


The nested REPORT_VERSION element was ignored because in the REPORT element, ALL_REPORT_VERSIONS was
specified as the option attribute. Change the combination of rules; delete the option attribute; or delete the report.
N612W- Recipient xxx is overridden by ALL_RECIPIENTS.
The nested RECIPIENT element was ignored because in the RECIPIENTS element, ALL_RECIPIENTS was specified as
the option attribute. Change the combination of rules; delete the option attribute; or delete the recipient.
N613E- Only one xxx element per distribution instance is allowed.
Each DISTRIBUTION_INSTANCE element can have only one DISTRIBUTION_GROUPS, RECIPIENTS, or REPORTS element.
Delete the additional elements in the DISTRIBUTION_INSTANCE element. Then resubmit.
N614E- Cannot find a distribution matching the input timestamp xxx
The specified timestamp for RERUN is not valid; Mobius did not perform a distribution. Change the timestamp. Then
resubmit.
N615E- The argument xxx is required for the rerunning prior distributions mode
Add the timestamp parameter to the command. Then resubmit.
N616E- Cannot find a distribution matching the input reports list xxx
The specified report IDs are not valid; Mobius did not perform a distribution. Change the report IDs. Then resubmit.
N617E- Service instance name xxx could not be resolved.
Mobius did not find the document server link. Change the document server link name. Then resubmit.
N618E- File xxx not found.
Mobius did not find an XML file with the specified name and path. Change the XML file name and path. Then
resubmit.
N619W- Report version xxx ignored due to incorrect format
In the XML file, the format of the report version ID is incorrect. Change the format to yyyyMMddHHmmss. Then
resubmit.
N620E- Invalid distribution timestamp: xxx.
In the XML file, the format of the timestamp is incorrect. Change the format to yyyyMMddHHmmss. Then resubmit.
N621E- Invalid distribution start time specified : xxx
In the XML file, the format of the distribution start time is incorrect. Change the format to yyyyMMddHHmmss. Then
resubmit.
N622E- Invalid distribution end time specified : xxx
In the XML file, the format of the distribution end time is incorrect. Change the format to yyyyMMddHHmmss. Then
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 611

resubmit.
N623E- There is nothing to distribute

N625E- <DISTRIBUTION_GROUPS> element should contain ALL_GROUPS or ALL_EMAIL_GROUPS or ALL_PRINT_G
ROUPS Option value or nested elements <DISTRIBUTION_GROUP>
The DISTRIBUTION_GROUPS element was ignored because there were no nested DISTRIBUTION_GROUP elements or
because the option value was not set to ALL_GROUPS, ALL_EMAIL_GROUPS, or ALL_PRINT_GROUPS. Correct the
DISTRIBUTION_GROUPS element in the XML file. Then resubmit.
N626E- No distribution groups matching the criteria were found.
Change the distribution criteria. Then resubmit.
N627E- <RECIPIENTS> element should be specified

N628E- Internal error. Please consult the logs and contact Rocket Technical Support.

N629E- No recipients matching the criteria were found.
Change the distribution criteria. Then resubmit.

Correct the XML input file. Then resubmit.

Correct the XML input file. Then resubmit.

Correct the XML input file. Then resubmit.

Edit one or more parameters in the XML input file. Then resubmit.
N639E- Distribution type must be specified.

N640E- Can't have more than one active encryption key: "xxx" cannot be processed.
You attempted to add or modify an encryption key and make it active, but an active encryption key already exists.
Only one encryption key can be active at a time. Make the current active encryption key inactive. Then repeat the
request.
N641E- Deleted active encryption key xxx. Restart the Mobius Server for this change to take effec
t.
To make this change take effect, restart the Mobius server.
N642E- Encryption key xxx does not exist.
Select another encryption key, or create a new encryption key.
N643E- There is already an active encryption key in the database. The encryption key xxx will not
be the active key.
Mobius attempted to add or modify an encryption key and make it active. But an active key already exists. The
encryption key was added or modified, but it is set to inactive. To make a new or modified encryption key active,
make the current active key inactive. Then submit a job to make the new or modified encryption key the active key.
N644E- Missing active encryption key: Either key "xxx" was deleted, or its value was changed.
You deleted the active encryption key or changed the value associated with it. To make a change to the encryption
key take effect, restart the Mobius server.
N645E- Amazon S3 error: xxx.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 613


## Page 614


Check the Java logs for a full trace.
N646E- Encryption key xxx cannot be deleted because it has been used to encrypt report versions.
Please delete the report versions first.
The vdrdbxml command attempted to delete an encryption key, but some report versions still use the key. Delete the
report versions. Then resubmit.
N647E- Report is configured for encryption but no active encryption key was detected. Please crea
te an active encryption key.
Create an encryption key. Then resubmit.
N648E- Encryption key xxx is the active encryption key. Please choose another encryption key as t
he active key before deleting the current active encryption key.
Mobius tried to delete the active encryption key. Create an encryption key and make it the active key, or choose
another encryption key to be the active key. Then delete the original active encryption key.
N649E- Encryption key xxx was not made inactive because no other active encryption key was provid
ed.
Mobius attempted to make an encryption key inactive. Create an encryption key and make it the active key, or choose
another encryption key to be the active key.
N650E- Encryption key xxx is the active encryption key. An active encryption key cannot be delete
d while there are reports configured for encryption.
Mobius attempted to delete an active encryption key, but reports or report versions still use the key. Delete the
report versions that use the encryption key, or disable encryption for all reports. Make the key inactive. Then
resubmit.
N651E- An active encryption key was not provided. Encryption key xxx was made the active encrypti
on key.
Mobius attempted to process an encryption key record, but an active encryption key was not provided. Mobius made
the first encryption key that was added the active key. Verify that the correct encryption key is active. Then resubmit.
N652E- Cannot enable encryption for report xxx because an active encryption key was not found.
Create a new encryption key. Then resubmit.
N653I- Added active encryption key xxx. Restart the Mobius Server for this change to take effect.
An active encryption key was added. To make the change take effect, restart the Mobius server.
N654E- Error creating backup file for encryption key xxx. Please export the key manually before u
sing the encryption key.
Mobius was not able to create a backup file of the encryption key. Manually create a backup file of the encryption key.
655I- The backup file for encryption key xxx is located at yyy.

Mobius created a backup file of the encryption key and stored it in the backup directory. No action is required.
N656E- Azure Blob error: xxx.
Check the Java logs for a full trace.
N657E- Storage class xxx is not supported as a replication source.
Specify a supported replication source.
N658E- Process shutting down; unable to complete the current operation.
After the server restarts, retry the operation.
N659E- Feature not supported by your DBMS.
Review the message log for details and for information about which DBMS supports that action.
N660E- Unable to perform partition-aware topic removal: xxx.
The adelete -y T command failed. Correct the command. Then resubmit. If the message indicates “report version
mismatch," add the adelete –y G option to ignore the mismatch and proceed.
N662I- Successfully submitted Report xxx Version yyy for OCR processing after archive creation.
No action is required.

the length of the temporary file path.
N664I- Successfully submitted Report xxx Version yyy for full text indexing after OCR processing.
No action is required.

No action is required.
N666E- OCR processing failure for job xxx, task yyy, performing zzz.
Check the log file to see what caused the error. Correct the job, and then resubmit it for OCR processing and full text
indexing.
N667E- Error adding Post Archiving policy xxx for job yyy.
After successful archive creation, OCR processing of the specified job failed. Check the log file to determine what
caused the error. Correct the job, and then resubmit it for OCR processing and full text indexing.
N668I- Failed OCR job for Report xxx Version yyy was deleted.

No action is required.
