Related information
Error messages
Policies (P*) messages
Review the following error messages related to policies in Mobius.
P001W- Field name already exists.
Specify a unique field name. Then resubmit.
P002W- Group name already exists.
Specify a unique group name. Then resubmit.
P003W- Invalid date format – max date will not be set.
The format of the date in the Maximum Date field is incorrect. Specify a date in MMDDYYYY format. Then resubmit.
P004W- Invalid date format – min date will not be set.
The format of the date in the Minimum Date field is incorrect. Specify a date in MMDDYYYY format. Then resubmit.
P005W- Field name has invalid characters.
The field name is blank or contains invalid characters. Field names can contain only alphanumeric characters and
underscores (_). Specify a valid field name. Then resubmit.
P006W- Group name has invalid characters.
The specified group name is blank or contains invalid characters. Group names can contain only alphanumeric
characters, underscores (_), hyphens (-), and dollar signs ($). Specify a valid group name. Then resubmit.
P007W- You cannot delete a level with field definitions in it.
Delete the field definitions, and then delete the level.
P008W- Minimum value xxx is greater than maximum value yyy – setting maximum value to xxx.P008W-
Minimum value xxx is greater than maximum value yyy – setting maximum value to xxx.
You attempted to specify a minimum value that is higher than the maximum value. Change the minimum or
maximum value. Then resubmit.
P009W- String contains invalid characters or the mask '*' is not the last character
• The string you entered contains characters that are not valid. Correct the string and resubmit.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 616


## Page 617


• The asterisk wildcard character in the match string was not the last character. Make the asterisk wildcard the
last character. Then resubmit.
P010W- Do you want to save the changes to policy xxx?
Click Yes to save the changes; click No to discard the changes; or click Cancel.
P011W- Unable to save policy. Please close Archive Creation window.
Close the Archive Creation window. Then save the policy.
P016E- Error parsing policy xxx: Line yyy - zzz
The policy contains an error in the specified line number. This error indicates that the policy file is damaged or is an
incompatible version. Delete the policy. Then recreate it.
P017E- Invalid policy name.
To save a policy, you must enter a policy name.
P018W- Would you like to add the new string match to the list?
To add text to the match list, select Yes. To discard the text, select No. To continue adding or editing field definitions,
select Cancel.
P021E- Enter the field name.
Enter the field name. Then resubmit.
P022E- Unable to build the page.
The page setting parameters do not conform to the sample file format. Correct the page setting parameters.
P023E- Unable to open file “xxx”.
The sample file xxx specified in the policy cannot be opened. Select another sample file that has the same data layout.
P024W- The length of the matching text is out of the required string length range.
For a variable length text field, the match string that you entered has fewer characters than the minimum length that
you selected or has more characters than the maximum length that you selected For a fixed-length text field, the
number of characters in the match string that you entered is not equal to the string length you selected. Change the
value in one or more string length fields. Then resubmit.
P025W- Do you want to delete region “xxx” and all of its contents?
You are trying to delete a region that contains fields, another region, or both. To delete the region, click Yes. To
cancel the delete request, click No.
P026W- Region name already exists.
Specify a unique name.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 617


## Page 618


P027W- Region name has invalid characters.
Correct the name. Then resubmit.
P028W- The month or day of the Match date is invalid.
The month that you entered is not in the range 1 - 12, or the day that you entered is not valid for the month. Change
the value in the Month field, Day field, or both fields. Then resubmit.
P029W- The length to pad xxx is greater than the length to truncate yyy - setting the length to t
runcate to xxx
The value in the Pad to the length field is higher than the value in the Truncate to the length field. Change the
value in the Pad to the length field, Truncate to the length field, or both fields. Then resubmit.
P030W- The maximum date cannot be earlier than the minimum date
The date in the Maximum date field is earlier then the date in the Minimum date field. Change one of the dates.
P031E- Start anchor cannot be found. Unable to create the region.
You tried to create a region based on an anchor, but the start anchor was not found. Correct the anchor. Then
resubmit.
P033E- An empty region cannot be opened.
No action is required.
P034W- Match string “xxx” contains a wildcard in an invalid position.
The asterisk is valid as a wildcard only at the end of the match string. The asterisk in the current position cannot be
used as a wildcard. Delete the string from the match string list, or clear the option to use wildcards in match strings.
P035E- Enter the element name.
The XML Element Name field is blank. Enter the XML element name.
P036E- xxx error: line yyy, column zzzzzz.
An error occurred while processing the XML document. Report the error to your system administrator.
P037E- Error loading XML document.
An error occurred while loading the XML document. Contact your system administrator.
P038E- The data type cannot be changed for non-empty policy.
After you created a policy, you tried to change the data type. Open a sample file that has the correct data type, or
create a new policy.
P039E- A system memory allocation error occurred.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 618


## Page 619


Close applications that are not required for the archiving process.
P040I- The page exceeds the size that Visual Parser can display.
The maximum size of a page to display is 317.67 square inches. No action is required.
P041I- Limit is reached. Only the first xxx pages of the section were loaded for policy processin
g.
You selected section as the processing scope, or you loaded a policy that specifies processing by section, but the
section contains too many pages. No action is required.
P042W- Cannot find xxx. Do you want to use that file anyway?
The system cannot locate the specified file. To save the file name in the policy file and process the document with the
functions in this file when it is available, click Yes. To re-enter the file name, click No.
P056W- Resource path cannot be specified relative to input file location.
The resources for the report input file are on a drive or network server that is different from the drive or network
server of the report input file. Specify an absolute path for the resources, or move the resources to a location where
policy processing can find them, relative to the report input file location. You might need to move the resources if
they are inaccessible during archiving. This situation occurs when resource files and the report input file reside on a
different operating systems.
P058E- Unable to open the file that contains the external metadata – xxx.
• The specified file does not exist. Check the path and file name. Make sure that you entered the name correctly.
• You do not have the authority to select the file. Reset the permissions for this file.
P059E- The xxx file is not in a valid XML format.
You selected a file that is not an XML file. Select a different file. Make sure that you enter the name of an XML file.
P064E- Audit & Analytics Services must be installed on the Mobius machine
The policy that you selected to archive reports has the group usage Audit & Analytics Services (AAS). This type of
policy initiates balancing processes in AAS. Mobius tried to start AAS, but was unable to locate it.
• To use the selected policy to archive reports, ask the AAS administrator to install AAS on the same machine as
Mobius.
• If balancing is not required, change the group usage in the policy; or select a different policy.
P065E- Archive creation terminated by external system.
Audit & Analytics Services terminated archive creation. Review the message log for details.
P066E- Group with usage ABS already exists.
You tried to specify Audit and Analytics Services (AAS) usage for a group, but another group already has this usage.
Only one policy group can have AAS usage. Correct the usage. Then resubmit.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 619


## Page 620


P069E- To change the format of the extracted data, you must specify the format.
You indicated that you want to change the format of the data, but you did not specify a format. Enter the format. Use
a wildcard character to represent extracted data; use literals to represent the characters that you want to display.
P071E- Cannot find rule procedure.
Audit & Analytics Services did not find a matching rule procedure in its database. Correct and resubmit.
P073E- Cannot set section processing scope. The number of pages in the section exceeds the xxx pa
ge limit.
• The section ID is not defined correctly for this report input file. Redefine the section ID, or select a different
policy for this report input file.
• The number of pages in the section exceeds the specified limit. To increase the section page limit, specify a
higher value for the SectionSizeLimit parameter in the mobius.reg file:[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\
Mobius\INI\RDSWIN.INI\Policy]"SectionSizeLimit"="100".
P081E- There is no sample file associated with this policy. Select a sample file
Before you can save or close a policy, you must select a sample file to apply the policy to. Specify a sample file. Then
save the policy.
P085E- Please set page attributes.
The selected data type requires page attributes. Click Page Attributes. Then select attributes.
P086E- The resource file “xxx” cannot be found.
The archiving process cannot find the presentation, policy, or image, or PDF overlay files in the specified directory.
Copy all required files to the specified directory.
P087E- You cannot add a field directly to the location index group. Instead, add the field to a t
opic group within the location index group.
You tried to add a location index to a group that is not used as a topic. Add the field to a topic group within the
location index group.
P089E- To delete nested table or column “xxx”, you need to delete its parent table “yyy”.
You attempted to delete a field that references a table column or nested table within a region of an LPFD report. You
can delete the entire table, not its individual components.
P090E- Mobius cannot start Audit & Analytics Services. Re-install Audit & Analytics Services.
The policy selected to archive reports has a group usage of Audit & Analytics Services (AAS). This type of policy
initiates balancing processes in AAS. Mobius cannot start AAS because it was not installed properly. Ask your AAS
administrator to reinstall AAS. If balancing is not required, select a different policy, or change the group usage in the
policy.
P092E- The policy xxx could not load the specified user exit yyy.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 620


## Page 621


• The path or user exit name specified in the policy is incorrect. Correct the user exit path and file name, or
remove the user exit from the policy.
• The user exit specified in the policy does not exist. Create the user exit and save it with the specified user exit
name and path, or remove the user exit from the policy.
P096E- Page-break tag "xxx" was not found in report.
Correct the XML file. Then resubmit.
P097E- Page-break tag "xxx" exists on multiple levels, or at an inappropriate level.
Correct the XML file. Then resubmit.
P099E- Page size exceeds the limit of xxx bytes.
Verify that the XML policy and input XML file are correct. If they are correct, increase the MaxArchivePageSize setting
in the mobius.reg file.
P108E- Can't overwrite policy with different type.
The name of the policy that you specified is already being used by a policy that has a different policy type. Save the
policy with a different name.
P109E- Please create redaction rules before saving the policy.
You attempted to save or close a redaction policy that does not have any redaction rules. Create at least one
redaction rule. Then save the policy.
P111E- Redaction failed: xxx.
The message indicates the specific reason. Correct the problem. Then resubmit.
Related information
Error messages
Shared Mobius z/OS (S*) messages
Review the following shared messages related to Mobius z/OS.
S022E- The current report page could not be read
You do not have permission to view the page. Check the message log for Mobius server. Ask your Mobius
administrator to give you the required permission.
S042E- The report version is currently unavailable
Could not load the requested report version. Check the message log of Mobius server for additional information.
S048E- The report security information could not be read
You do not have access to the specified report version. Ask your Mobius administrator to give you the required
permission.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 621


## Page 622


S051E- A recipient record could not be found for you.
A recipient record refers to a record in the RECIPIENT database table. Click Technical info. Record the information
displayed. Ask your system administrator to add a recipient record for you.
S053E- Your password is invalid.
Enter the correct password.
S054E- A server session could not be opened.
An error occurred in one of the Mobius server components. Click Technical info. Record the information displayed.
Report the problem to your system administrator.
S058E- The report record could not be found.
Unable to find the requested content class in the database due to an incorrect report ID (content class name), or the
report record was deleted from the database. Report the problem to your system administrator.
S061E- An error occurred in the communications with the server.
A connection error occurred in a Mobius server component. Click Technical info. Record the information displayed.
Report the problem to your system administrator.
S095E- Not Authorized for online access
You are not authorized for online access. Ask your Mobius administrator to give you the required permission.
Related information
Error messages
Mobius on Windows or Linux server (W*) messages
Review the following error messages related to Mobius on Windows or Linux server.
W003W- The text you were searching for was not found.
The search string was not found. Enter a different search string, or begin the search from a different location on the
page. Confirm that the search string is correctly spelled. If you selected the As Is option, confirm that the case of the
search string matches the contents of the report.
W015E- Blank Server ID is not valid.
Enter a value in the Server ID field. Then retry the function.
W023E- Invalid page number: Page number must be positive.
Specify a positive page number. Then retry.
W039E- A report page positioning error has occurred.
An error was encountered while using "fuzzy positioning" to locate a page. Set EstimatePageLocation to false. Then
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 622


## Page 623


retry.
W040W- The top of the report has been reached.
No action is required.
W041W- The bottom of the report has been reached.
No action is required.
W045E- Syntax Error- Invalid data: "TOPIC_ITEM_MAX_LENGTH."
The XML tag TOPIC_ITEM_MAX_LENGTH was specified for a non-character topic. Change the type of data to character,
or edit the XML file and remove the TOPIC_ITEM_MAX_LENGTH tag.
W046E- Syntax Error: Missing parameter: xxx
A command is missing a required parameter. Add the required parameter.
W047E- I/O error with file: xxx
An error occurred during an attempt to access the specified file. Click Technical info. Record the information
displayed. Additional actions depend on this information, which varies based the type of server and the specific
problem.
Permission denied
If the error occurred when you were attempting to create an archive, confirm that the archive model file name
points to a directory that the server has write access to.
Too many open files
Close some files. Then try again.
No such file or directory
Verify that the file name and path are valid and that the server where the file resides is currently available.
Transient error
A transient error might indicate a momentary LAN problem. Try again.
W049E- Error opening: xxx for read.
• Mobius encountered an error opening a file identified by a path and file name, image file, or script. Verify that
the file name is correct. Then retry the operation. If the file name is correct, check if the file is damaged. If this
error occurs while attempting to run a PLAYBACK script command, verify that the script you are trying to play
back is not already running.
• You already opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that resource
limits are adequate for the current system usage.
W050E- Error opening: xxx for write
While saving a script or exported file, an error occurred.
• Verify that the file name is correct. Then retry.
• You already opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that resource
limits are adequate for the current system usage.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 623


## Page 624


W055E- Error xxx executing: yyy
An attempt to run the specified command failed. Report the problem to your system administrator.
W064E- Function could not be performed on report.
You requested an action that cannot be performed because of the current state of the report. Verify that the proper
conditions exist for the action. For additional information, see the Mobius server message log.
W066W- Not enough memory to complete operation. Close some windows and try again.
These conditions typically cause the error:
• Running Mobius and many other applications in the same Windows session. Close one or more of the other
applications before you start Mobius. Or make more conventional memory available to Windows by removing
unnecessary device drivers from the CONFIG.SYS or AUTOEXEC.BAT file.
• Requesting an operation when a resource, such as a DLL file, is missing from the directory and search path.
Verify that all required resources are available. Then try the action again.
W068E- Printer setup error. Use Control Panel to check your printer settings.
A printer setup error occurred while you were trying to perform print distribution. Verify the printer and print
distribution settings.
W073E- AFP Error: xxx, with resource yyy, type zzz.
An error occurred while processing the specified IBM AFP resource. Refresh copies of the resource that are in the
directory specified by the AFP Resource Pathin the mobius.reg file. Then retry. If the problem persists, contact your
system administrator.
W077W- DJDE/Metacode Warning: xxx, with resource yyy, RC=aaa, RE=bbb
During an attempt to display a Xerox DJDE/Metacode page, an error occurred. The page is displayed as accurately as
possible. No action is required.
W078E- DJDE/Metacode Error: xxx, with resource yyy, RC=aaa, RE=bbb
An error resulted from processing the specified Xerox DJDE/Metacode resource. Refresh copies of the resource found
in the directory specified by the DJDE Resource Path in the mobius.reg file. Then retry. If the problem persists,
contact your system administrator.
W082E- Could not find xxx
Verify that the specified object exists. Then try again.
W083E- Error processing image
The image file that you are viewing might be invalid, damaged, or using a feature that Mobius does not support. If
possible, recreate the image. If you continue have problems processing the image, contact your system
administrator.
W084E- Unsupported image type
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 624


## Page 625


• The image file is damaged. If possible, recreate the image. If you still have problems processing it, contact your
system administrator.
• The image file has a file extension that does not represent the actual image type. For example, a Windows
bitmap must have the BMP extension. Rename the file with the correct file extension.
• The image you are trying to view is not a supported image type. Ask your system administrator if the image can
be converted to a format that Mobius supports.
W087E- Installation error: xxx not found.
Mobius cannot find one of its components. Reinstall Mobius. If the problem persists, contact your system
administrator.
W094E- An internal logic error occurred in communication with the server.
An unexpected error occurred in communications with the Mobius server. Retry the action. If the problem persists,
contact your system administrator.
W096E- The following option is not enabled: xxx
The option that you tried to use is not enabled. Contact your system administrator.
W097W- Could not write resource xxx to resource path 'yyy'.
Mobius is unable to write the resource to the resource directory. The resource path is not valid, or the user does not
have write access to the path. Verify that the resource path exists. Verify that the user has write access to the path.
Specify a resource path that the user has write access to, or turn off resource caching.
W098E- The requested list is empty
The list that you tried to view is empty or does not contain items that you are authorized to view. If the list is not
empty, contact your system administrator who can verify your access authorization.
W103E- Page contents invalid.
The LPFD page being archived is not valid or was damaged during transmission. See the Mobius server message log
for additional information. Correct and resubmit.
W104E- Windows library load error xxx, library name yyy
A Windows DLL file or Linux *.so file cannot be loaded. This situation happens when the library is missing, cannot be
found, or is damaged. Contact your system administrator.
W105E- External interface xxx invalid
The specified DLL file is an incorrect version or is damaged. Contact your system administrator.
W107D- An internal system logic error occurred.
An error occurred in one of the Windows components of Mobius. Click Technical info. Record the information
displayed. Report the problem to your system administrator.
W108E- A system memory allocation error occurred.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 625


## Page 626


The operating system cannot allocate sufficient memory for Mobius component programs. The lack of memory can
occur directly within Mobius or indirectly when other programs use too much memory.
To determine which process or program is using too much memory, on Windows use Task Manager or on Linux, use
the ps -e -l -y command.
• If a program other than a Mobius program is using too much memory, close the program. If it is a required
program, close and then restart it to see if it uses less memory after restarting.
• If the program that is using too much memory is a database server, move the server to another machine. The
Mobius server and the database server should not run on the same machine.
• If the archive creation processing log file indicates that archiving a very large associated data file, such as a
video or sound file, failed, break the file into smaller components. Then archive each individually.
• Open the RDSWIN.MSG file, and look for messages that might help you locate the problem.
• Check whether the drive used for system swap space on the server is full. If the drive is full, stop and then
restart the server. If this action does not correct the problem, consider adding more memory to the server
machine.
W110W- Could not get xxx yyy
Mobius cannot obtain the specified resource from the Mobius server. Lack of this resource might cause the AFP or
DJDE/Metacode report that you are archiving to display incorrectly. Move the specified resource to the resource path.
W112E- DJDE/Metacode Error: xxx, RC=aaa, RE=bbb
An error occurred during an attempt to archive a Xerox DJDE/Metacode page. Report the problem to your system
administrator.
W113W- DJDE/Metacode Warning: xxx, RC=aaa, RE=bbb
During an attempt to archive a Xerox DJDE/Metacode page, a warning occurred. The page will be displayed as
accurately as possible. No action is required.
W115E- "xxx" is not a valid "yyy"
The entry is blank, has an invalid length, or contains invalid characters. Correct the entry.
W122W- Cannot read from drive xxxxx
While attempting to convert from a mapped drive letter to a UNC path, an error occurred. Instead of specifying a
mapped drive, specify the UNC path. Confirm that the network is working properly.
W123E- Unable to initialize database interface environment.
While attempting to interface to the ODBC driver manager, an error occurred. Close other programs to free up
memory. Then retry. If the command fails again, verify that ODBC is installed correctly.
W124E- The driver for xxx is not ODBC Level 1 compliant. Try a different driver.
Contact your database vendor for a newer driver, or try a different database.
W125E- ODBC error: “xxx”
These problems typically cause this error:
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 626


## Page 627


• During database setup, an ODBC data source was not specified. Complete the database setup procedure.
• If your site uses another vendor’s database, failure to specify an ODBC data source using the ODBC
administrator before performing database setup. Run the ODBCADM.EXE program, which usually located in the
Windows/System directory, and set up the ODBC data source. Then complete database setup.
• More than one user attempted to update a database table at the same time. Click the appropriate button in
the error dialog box. If you click Ignore, annotation changes are discarded, and the requested operation
continues.
• Failure in the ODBC database system. Report the problem to the database administrator.
• The database contains topic items that are not associated with a report version. Contact Rocket Technical
Support for help deleting the topic items that are not associated with a report version.
Note: If the error message text includes The operation cannot be performed on database because
it is involved in a database mirroring session or an availability group., and you are
trying to initialize the database, suspend mirroring. Then initialize the database and resume mirroring.
W126E- xxx “yyy” already exists
You attempted to use a key that already exists to add a record. The attempt failed because fields must be unique.
Correct and resubmit.
W127E- Unable to add xxx “yyy”.
Your attempt to add the specified record failed. Verify that the database server is correctly installed and that
sufficient disk space is available to add data to the database.
W128E- Unable to add xxx “yyy”: the specified zzz does not exist
You attempted to add a record that refers to a nonexistent report, report version, topic, or topic version. Add the
appropriate report, report version, topic, or topic version. Then try again.
W129W- End of list.
More data was requested than actually exists. No action is required.
W131E- Unable to update xxx “yyy.”
You attempted to update the specified record, but the attempt failed. Verify that the database server is correctly
installed and that sufficient disk space is available to add data to the database.
W132E- Unable to delete xxx “yyy”: one or more zzz which reference it still exist
You attempted to delete the specified record, but another table has records that refer to this record. A record cannot
be deleted until records from all tables that refer to it are deleted. For example, all versions of a report must be
deleted before the report can be deleted. Delete the appropriate records. Then try again.
W133E- Unable to delete xxx “yyy”
You attempted to delete the specified record, but the attempt failed. Verify that the database engine is correctly
installed.
W135E- Server / database mismatch error.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 627


## Page 628


You attempted to retrieve a type of information that does not exist in the database. This message typically indicates a
version mismatch. Verify that Mobius View and the Mobius server are correctly installed and that all components are
from the same release of the product.
W136E- The session handle passed to function xxx must contain an open archive.
The program invoked a Mobius API function, passing it a session handle that does not contain an open archive when
the function requires that an archive be open in the given session. Report the problem to your system administrator.
W138E- ODBC driver not responding as expected. Try a different driver.
The ODBC driver is defective. Contact your database vendor for a different driver, or try a different database.
W142E- The requested item could not be found.
The requested item does not exist, or you are not authorized to access it. Ask your system administrator to verify
your access authorization and to verify that the item exists.
W146E- Data validation error: The starting topic value is too long.
The topic item value exceeds the maximum topic item length. Shorten the topic item in the database to be equal to
or less than the maximum topic item length.
W149E- Maximum number of sessions already open for this server.
Close one or more open sessions for the current document server; use a different document server; or ask your
administrator to raise the limit of concurrent sessions.
W153E- File xxx does not exist.
Specify an existing file.
W155E- Filename too long.
The archive cannot be created because the generated file name is longer than 255 characters. To generate a shorter
file name, edit the file name template.
W157E- DBI could not find database schema version. DBI expects version xxx.
Mobius cannot open the database because the schema version for the Mobius Server database was not found. The
database might be out of date or damaged. Ask your Mobius administrator to back up the database and then run
database setup.
W158E- Incompatible database version. Run schema extension script to update to version xxx from c
urrent version yyy.
Mobius cannot open the database because the schema version that the database returned is not the required
version. The database is probably from a previous release of Mobius. Ask your Mobius administrator to convert the
database.
W159E- Error detected. A description of the problem is not available.
An unexpected error occurred. Retry the action that caused the error. If the problem persists, contact your system
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 628


## Page 629


administrator who might need to contact Rocket Technical Support.
W160E- Invalid filename for document archive file: xxx
The archive cannot be created because the document archive file name contains invalid characters. To generate a file
name that the storage system will accept, edit the file name template.
W161E- Unable to make filename unique: xxx
• The archive cannot be created because the %UNIQUE% field cannot produce a unique file name. Delete
unneeded files to free usable file names, or edit the template that generates the file name and allow a longer
unique string within the file name.
• You already opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that resource
limits are adequate for current system usage.
W162E- I/O error while processing image.
While reading or writing an image or Postscript file, an error occurred. The image might be damaged, or the disk or
network might have failed. If the problem persists, contact your system administrator.
W165E- A session could not be opened.
A client was unable to open a new session with the Mobius server, or a new distribution session was not opened.
Report the problem to your system administrator.
W166E- Communications could not be initialized.
The Mobius server was unable to initialize communications with the audit service. Report the problem to your system
administrator.
W167E- A communications error has occurred.
These are the typical causes of this error:
• The server settings are not defined correctly. Review the server configuration, and verify that the
communication protocol settings are correct.
• Tomcat rejected the request. To get more information, open the Tomcat log file, catalina.out.
W172E- Operation canceled.
No action is required.
W173E- Unknown variable xxx in model filename.
The archive cannot be created because the file name template contains an invalid substitutable substring. Edit the file
name template.
W174E- An I/O error occurred while writing to archive.
The archive was not created because a write process did not finish. This situation might occur when the disk is full or
when there is a disk error. For network-mounted volumes, this situation might indicate a network error. Ask your
network administrator to examine the disk or network volume.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 629


## Page 630


W175E- The requested report has no pages, and can’t be opened.
The requested report archive is empty and has no pages to display. Use Mobius Administrator to delete the archive.
W185E- Your search was cancelled because the number of search results exceeded the maximum numbe
r set by your administrator. Refine your search, and try again.
Make your search criteria more specific so that there are fewer results. If the search still produces too many results,
ask your server administrator to review the setting for the Mobius registry option SQL Query Row Limit, which limits
the number of rows returned by a query.
W188E- Only one instance of this application is permitted.
You can run only one instance of the application at a time. Use the instance that is already running. If the instance is
busy, wait for it to finish processing.
W189E- Invalid Document Server Name, xxx.
Verify the spelling of the document server name. If this message is displayed while you are configuring a document
server, the name contains invalid characters. All characters, except [ (left bracket) and ] (right bracket) are valid.
W190E- File xxx, is not a Document Archive File.
The OpenArchive API is unable to open the specified document archive file. The file specified in the report version
record is not in document archive file format or might be damaged. Report the problem to your system
administrator.
W192I- Your database is already at the 1.5 schema level. Run the Database Conversion program to
update your database structure to the most current level.
Convert the database to the level that this version of Mobius requires.
W196E- The file xxx already exists and is read-only.
Remove the read-only attribute. Then restart the archiving process.
W197E- The filename of xxx is not unique.
A unique file name was created using the archive model file name, but before the process finished, another process
created a file with the same name. Create the archive again. If the problem persists, delete or rename the file that
has the same name, remove the %Unique% file name requirement, or change the archive model file name.
W204E- Unable to open log file: xxx
• The archiving process cannot locate the file. Verify that path specified in processing options is valid, and verify
that you have write access to the path.
• You already opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that resource
limits are adequate for the current system usage.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 630


## Page 631


W205E- Unable to write log file: xxx
• There is insufficient free space on the specified disk. Free some disk space, or change the location of the log
files.
• You do not have access to the specified directory. Verify that you have access to the specified directory.
• You already opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that resource
limits are adequate for the current system usage.
W206E- Unable to create exception file: xxx
• Verify that the path entered in the processing options is valid.
• You already have opened the maximum number of files that your operating system permits. Verify that
resource limits are adequate for the current system usage.
W207E- Version mismatch: requested xxx, found yyy.
The OpenArchive processing located the file that should contain the requested report version. However, the file
contains pages from a different version of the report. These are the common causes for the error. In both cases,
report the problem to your system administrator.
• The vdrdbxml command was used to incorrectly update the database. For example, in the Report Version
table, an incorrect document archive file name was entered for the specified report version.
• The document archive file for the requested report version was replaced with the document archive file for a
different version of the report.
W208E- Report name mismatch: requested xxx, found yyy.
The OpenArchive processing located the file that should contain the requested report. However, the file contains
pages from a different report. These are the common causes for the error. In both cases, report the problem to your
system administrator.
• The XML Importer was used to incorrectly update the database. For example, in the Report Version table, an
incorrect document archive file name was entered for the specified report version.
• The document archive file for the requested report version was replaced with a document archive file for a
different report.
W217E- Unable to create directory xxx.
You attempted to create a directory on a drive that you do not have write access to. Specify a different drive for the
directory.
W218E- Database update rejected: data xxx is not valid for field yyy
An invalid value was entered in the specified field. Correct the value, and retry.
W219E- External system error.
An error occurred in a module, such as a Windows DLL, that is external to Mobius. Retry the operation. If the problem
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 631


## Page 632


persists, contact your system administrator.
W222D- An internal error occurred and processing could not be completed. Please contact Customer
Support, and provide them with the exception log.
Click Technical info. Record the information displayed. Exit Mobius, and then restart it. Look in the Windows
directory for the exception log with a name that matches DrMobius*.log and for dump files that have a name that
matches DrMobius*.dmp. If the exception was generated while creating an extraction policy, the log and dump files
are on the machine that hosts Mobius View. Otherwise, the files are on the machine that is running the Mobius
server. Report the problem to your Mobius administrator who should send the exception log and the dump files to
Rocket Technical Support.
W236I- Database successfully converted from 1.4 to 1.5
No action is required.
W237E- Unable to update, xxx ‘yyy’ does not exist
You attempted to update a record, but that record references a device or distribution group that does not exist.
Correct the value for the specified field and retry, or add the referenced device or distribution group to the database.
W238E- Invalid input, field xxx cannot be empty.
Enter a value in the required field. Then retry.
A Microsoft Access data source cannot be converted. Open the Properties for the specified data source file, and clear
the read-only attribute.
W249E- Unable to add record into the xxx because the resource is locked by another transaction.
Please try again later.
You are attempting to add a record to a table that is being used by another database transaction. Reissue the request
later.
W250E- Unable to update record in the xxx because the record is locked by another transaction. P
lease try again later.
You are attempting to update a record, but the record is being used by another database transaction. Reissue the
request later.
W253E- Authentication Error: xxx
These are the typical reasons for this error:
• The password is not valid for this user ID. Enter the password that is valid for this user ID.
• The user ID does not exist. Re-enter the user ID.
• There is not enough memory to authenticate the user. Close one or more Windows applications and retry.
• The authentication server is not available. Try again later.
• A password is required. Enter the password.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 632


## Page 633


W259E- Unable to connect to Mobius Server because a timeout occurred.
These are the typical reasons for this error:
• The document server connection specifies a Mobius server that does not exist. Edit the document server
connection, and specify an existing Mobius server.
• The Mobius server is not running. Use the Server Controller to start the Mobius server.
• The Mobius server is running, but because of excessive network delay, a timeout occurred before you could
connect. Try again later, or increase the time-out value for the server. In Windows, edit the Windows registry; in
Linux, edit the mobius.reg file.
W260W- Another person is currently editing the overlay information for this page.
No action is required.
W261E- Unable to open report version. The document archive file is corrupted.
Check the Report Version database table to determine which document archive file is associated with the report
version. Then ask your network administrator to restore the file from backup.
W262E- The Java class is not specified.
The Java Launcher cannot find the specified Java class.
• If you started the Java Launcher by clicking an icon, reinstall Mobius.
• If you started the Java Launcher from the command line, verify the name of the Java class. Then reenter the
command.
W263E- Java Runtime Environment (JRE) could not be loaded.
If a recent installation was done, it’s possible that not all Mobius processes were terminated before performing the
installation. For example, on Windows, Server Controller might have remained in the system tray. If this situation
occurs, a required file might remain locked and marked for deletion. Then after system restart, the OS will delete that
required file.
If a recent installation was done, stop all Mobius processes, restart the server, and then re-install. Otherwise, review
the message log. Then contact Rocket Technical Support.
W265E- Unable to start Java Runtime Environment (JRE).
If a recent installation was done, it’s possible that not all Mobius processes were terminated before performing the
installation. For example, on Windows, Server Controller might have remained in the system tray. If this situation
occurs, a required file might remain locked and marked for deletion. Then after system restart, the OS will delete that
required file.
If a recent installation was done, stop all Mobius processes, restart the server, and then re-install. Otherwise, review
the message log. Then contact Rocket Technical Support.
W270E- Buffer too small.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 633


## Page 634


The buffer that contains document resources is not large enough to hold the number of resources that this
document requires for archiving. Examine the message log, which might indicate the size needed. Then in the
mobius.reg file, increase the value of the MaxArchivePageSize key:
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Mobius\INI\RDSWIN.INI\MISC]
"MaxArchivePageSize"="6000000"
W271E- Cannot return results. The number of items requested by the API program exceeds the buffe
r size limit.
Request fewer items, or ask your administrator to review the TechInfo message in the RDSWIN.MSG log on the server.
This log contains detailed information about available space.
W272E- Unrecoverable error in native code.
An error occurred in a Mobius component. Browse to the following URL. If necessary, replace localhost and 8080 as
appropriate for the Mobius server instance: http://localhost:8080/vdrws/
productAnalyzer?fromFsConfig=true&category=RECENTLOGS&category=RECENTDMPS Download the compressed
file. Send the file to Rocket Technical Support.
W277E- Unable to process this request because file “xxx” is currently open.
Close the specified file.
W278E- Unable to create temporary file “xxx”.
A temporary file cannot be created for one of these reasons:
• The default Windows temporary file directory specified by the TMP or TEMP environment variable on your
machine does not exist. Create the Windows temporary directory specified by the TMP or TEMP environment
variable. This directory is typically c:\temp. Then retry the action.
• The temporary directory contains the maximum number of .tmp files that the operating system allows. In this
case, xxx includes the path of the directory – for example: c:\temp\pag. Delete all .tmp files. Then retry the
action..
• You opened the maximum number of files that the operating system allows. Verify that resource limits are
adequate for the current system usage.
W281E- External interface xxx invalid; function yyy not exported.
A custom exit – such as, a policy exit, a client security exit, or a custom email distribution library – was specified, but a
required function was not exported from the library. Report the problem to your Mobius administrator or to the
person who provided the exit.
W282E- JNI exception.
The JNI interface returned an exception, or there was a problem starting the JNI interface. Review the message log. If
the cause isn’t obvious, report the problem to your Mobius administrator.
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 634


## Page 635


W285E- Invalid network address or host name: xxx.
Enter the correct network address or host name. Then resubmit.
W286E- The name xxx is not a valid link to the document server.
Enter a valid document server link.
W287W- Invalid Session. Connection terminated.
Mobius View attempted to communicate with the server after the session terminated. Open a new session, and try
again.
W289E- Invalid data was encountered.
You submitted invalid data. For example, you did not provide a specific, valid topic ID. Check the data. Verify that you
selected only one topic ID and that a default topic is defined.
W290E- Unsupported conversion: Report type xxx, output format "yyy"
You submitted an unsupported distribution combination. For example, you tried to distribute an AFP report to a
Postscript device. Check the data. Verify that you selected a supported distribution combination.
W292E- Cannot return results. Mobius is not able to recognize the characters in the request.
The operation you requested cannot be completed because of a formatting error. This message generally occurs
when the Mobius server and the client applications are using different ANSI to EBCDIC translation tables. Verify that
the Mobius server and the client applications are using the same ANSI to EBCDIC translation table. If the translation
tables are the same, report the problem to your system administrator who might need to contact Rocket Technical
Support.
W294E- The LIKE operator is invalid for numeric values.
The LIKE operator is not valid while searching numeric topic values. Use a different operator for the search.
W295E- No more than 10 Topic search constraints allowed.
The request contains more than 10 search criteria. Enter a request that has 10 or fewer search criteria.
W296E- The xxx search constraint specification is invalid.
The request contains more than one search criterion for a content class or section. Enter a request that has one
search criterion for the content class or section.
W297E- The topic was created with xxx value set to yyy. You must keep the same value for xxx.
The XML file referenced in the vdrdbxml command contains an action to modify the data type, data format, or case-
© 2026 Rocket Software, Inc. All Rights Reserved | Mobius Administrator Guide V12.4 635


## Page 636


preserving case-insensitive (CPCI) flag. Mobius does not allow you to make these modifications.
Remove the modify action from the XML file, or if you want to change the data type, data format, or CPCI flag, create
a new topic that has the correct value.
W300E- Stored procedures need to be updated to the xxx version. To do this, run Database Validat
ion.
The database cannot be opened because the stored procedures are not compatible with the schema version. The
most likely cause is that the database is from a previous release of Mobius. Ask your Mobius administrator to validate
the database.
W320E- Simple Search should be configured for this document server to allow All Topics search.
Enable simple search for the document server. Then retry.
W321E- DAF was encrypted with a customer key not known to this server.
Import the key that was used to encrypt the DAF.
W323E- Full Text Search should be configured for document server xxx to allow content search.
Enable full-text search for the document server. Then retry.
Related information
Error messages
Customizing the mobius.reg file
